---
title: "PCORI_SCD_data_cleaning_051326"
output: html_document
name: "Lizi Shao"
date: "2026-05-05"
---

Data analysis of PCORI SCD data; we have all sites for ED & IC including Boston and Indiana.

## Data traceability 
this file depends on PCORI_SCD_data_cleaning_050526.Rmd. 

# Clearing environment, loading raw data from REDCap
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
'setwd("setprojectdirectory")'
ls(); rm(list = ls()); gc();
require(gtsummary)
require(readr)
require(writexl)
require(readxl)
require(flextable)
require(officer)
require(magrittr)
require(tidyverse)
require(purrr)
require(effectsize)
require(lme4)

consort_table_ic <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/consort_table.csv")
consort_table_ed <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/consort_table_ed1.csv")

df_ic <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ic.csv")
df_ic1 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ic1.csv")

df_ic <- df_ic %>% 
  select(-X) 
df_ic1 <- df_ic1 %>% 
  select(-X)

df_ed <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ed.csv")
df_ed2 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ed2.csv")

df_ed <- df_ed %>% 
  select(-X) 
df_ed2 <- df_ed2 %>% 
  select(-X)

site_levels <- c(
  "boston medical center sitea",
  "christiana hospital siteb",
  "indiana university sitec",
  "university of kansas health system sitee",
  "university of maryland capital region health sitef",
  "university of minnesota siteg",
  "unc: university of north carolina sited",
  "upmc: university of pittsburgh medical center siteh",
  "vcu sitei"
)

reorder_site_id_fct <- function(d) {
  d$site_id <- factor(d$site_id, levels = site_levels)
  d
}

df_ic  <- reorder_site_id_fct(df_ic)
df_ic1 <- reorder_site_id_fct(df_ic1)
df_ed  <- reorder_site_id_fct(df_ed)
df_ed2 <- reorder_site_id_fct(df_ed2)
```

# EDA and statisticl tests
```{r}
# Table 9 and 9.1
number_unique_pts_bysite_ic <- tapply(df_ic1$patient_id, df_ic1$site_id, \(x) length(unique(x)))
number_unique_pts_bysite_ic
unname(number_unique_pts_bysite_ic)
c

number_encounters_bysite_ic <- tapply(df_ic1$patient_id, df_ic1$site_id, \(x) length(x))
number_encounters_bysite_ic
unname(number_encounters_bysite_ic)
unname(number_encounters_bysite_ic) %>% sum()

intended_reach <- c(584, 130, 180, 120, 227, 198, 450, 350, 1200)
(number_unique_pts_bysite_ic/intended_reach*100) %>% round(2) %>% paste0("%")

number_unique_pts_bysite_ed <- tapply(df_ed2$patient_id, df_ed2$site_id, \(x) length(unique(x)))
number_unique_pts_bysite_ed
number_unique_pts_bysite_ed %>% sum()

## Health/health outcomes table
df_ic2 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ic2.csv")
df_ed3 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ed3.csv")

nrow(df_ic2); length(unique(df_ic2$patient_id))
nrow(df_ed3); length(unique(df_ed3$patient_id))

fmt <- "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"   
tz  <- "UTC"                 

to_posix <- function(x) as.POSIXct(x, format = fmt, tz = tz)

df_ic2$firstmedadmin_datetime <- to_posix(df_ic2$firstmedadmin_datetime)
df_ic2$checkin_datetime       <- to_posix(df_ic2$checkin_datetime)
df_ic2$time_to_firstdose_mins <- as.numeric(difftime(df_ic2$firstmedadmin_datetime,
                                                    df_ic2$checkin_datetime,
                                                    units = "mins"))

df_ed3$firstmedadmin_datetime <- to_posix(df_ed3$firstmedadmin_datetime)
df_ed3$checkin_datetime       <- to_posix(df_ed3$checkin_datetime)
df_ed3$time_to_firstdose_mins <- as.numeric(difftime(df_ed3$firstmedadmin_datetime,
                                                      df_ed3$checkin_datetime,
                                                      units = "mins"))

#Check navie mean difference
t.test(df_ic2$time_to_firstdose_mins, df_ed3$time_to_firstdose_mins)

#mean difference while accounting for within individual correlations
df_ic2 <- df_ic2 %>% 
  mutate(group = "IC")

df_ed3 <- df_ed3%>% 
  mutate(group = "ED")


dat <- bind_rows(
  df_ic2   %>% select(patient_id, time_to_firstdose_mins, group, site_id),
  df_ed3 %>% select(patient_id, time_to_firstdose_mins, group, site_id)
) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("ED","IC"))) %>%   
  filter(!is.na(time_to_firstdose_mins), !is.na(patient_id))

sum(!is.na(dat[dat$group == "IC",]$time_to_firstdose_mins))
sum(!is.na(dat[dat$group == "ED",]$time_to_firstdose_mins))

length(unique(dat$patient_id[dat$group == "IC" & !is.na(dat$time_to_firstdose_mins)]))
length(unique(dat$patient_id[dat$group == "ED" & !is.na(dat$time_to_firstdose_mins)]))

fit <- lmer(time_to_firstdose_mins ~ group + (1 | patient_id), data = dat)
summary(fit)$coefficients

#Median for both groups
dat %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    q25 = quantile(time_to_firstdose_mins, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = quantile(time_to_firstdose_mins, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(time_to_firstdose_mins, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#Mean by group status and by site (no inference so naive mean)
site_means <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_to_firstdose_mins), !is.na(site_id)) %>%
  group_by(group, site_id) %>%
  summarise(site_mean = mean(time_to_firstdose_mins), .groups = "drop")

# range of site-level means within each group
site_means %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    min_mean = min(site_mean),
    max_mean = max(site_mean)
  )

#Cohen's D (assumes no equal-variance assumption): Pending!
cohens_d(df_ed2.1$time_to_firstdose_mins,
         df_ic2$time_to_firstdose_mins,
         pooled_sd = FALSE)

##Figure1. 
n_ed <- sum(dat$group == "ED")
n_ic <- sum(dat$group == "IC")
labs <- c("ED" = paste0("ED (", n_ed, " visits)"),
          "IC" = paste0("IC (", n_ic, " visits)"))
cap_w = 0.18


# whisker endpoints per group 
w <- dat %>%
    filter(!is.na(time_to_firstdose_mins)) %>%
    mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("ED","IC"))) %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    summarise(
        y_low  = boxplot.stats(time_to_firstdose_mins)$stats[1],
        y_high = boxplot.stats(time_to_firstdose_mins)$stats[5],
        .groups = "drop"
    )

ggplot(dat, aes(x = group, y = time_to_firstdose_mins)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "#8EC5FF", color = "#2F80ED", outlier.colour = "#2F80ED") +
    geom_segment(data = w,
                 aes(x = as.numeric(group) - cap_w, xend = as.numeric(group) + cap_w,
                     y = y_low, yend = y_low),
                 inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "#2F80ED", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_segment(data = w,
                 aes(x = as.numeric(group) - cap_w, xend = as.numeric(group) + cap_w,
                     y = y_high, yend = y_high),
                 inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "#2F80ED", linewidth = 0.4) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = labs) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Time to first dose (min)") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 520)) +
    theme_classic()

#Odds ratio and counts
df_ic1.1 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ic1.1.csv") %>% select(-X)
df_ed2.1 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ed2.1.csv") %>% select(-X)


nrow(df_ic1.1)
nrow(df_ed2.1)
table(df_ic1.1$discharge, useNA = "ifany")
table(df_ed2.1$discharge, useNA = "ifany")

df_ic1.1$hospital_admission <- if_else(df_ic1.1$discharge %in% c("Direct hospital admission", "ED for hospital admission"), 1L, 0L)
df_ed2.1$hospital_admission <- if_else(df_ed2.1$discharge == "Hospital admission", 1L, 0L)


df_ic1.1 <- df_ic1.1 %>% 
  mutate(group = "IC")

df_ed2.1 <- df_ed2.1 %>% 
  mutate(group = "ED")

df_combined1.1 <- bind_rows(select(df_ic1.1, all_of(c("patient_id", "hospital_admission", "group", "site_id"))), 
                         select(df_ed2.1, all_of(c("patient_id", "hospital_admission", "group", "site_id"))))

sum(!is.na(df_combined1.1[df_combined1.1$group == "IC",]$hospital_admission))
sum(!is.na(df_combined1.1[df_combined1.1$group == "ED",]$hospital_admission))

length(unique(df_combined1.1$patient_id[df_combined1.1$group == "IC" & !is.na(df_combined1.1$hospital_admission)]))
length(unique(df_combined1.1$patient_id[df_combined1.1$group == "ED" & !is.na(df_combined1.1$hospital_admission)]))

table(df_ic1.1$hospital_admission, useNA = "ifany")
table(df_ed2.1$hospital_admission, useNA = "ifany")
table(df_ic1.1$hospital_admission, useNA = "ifany")/nrow(df_ic1.1)
table(df_ed2.1$hospital_admission, useNA = "ifany")/nrow(df_ed2.1)

df_combined1.1$group <- relevel(factor(df_combined1.1$group), ref = "IC")
fit_LR <- glmer(hospital_admission ~ group + (1|patient_id), family = binomial, data = df_combined1.1)
summary(fit_LR)$coefficients

coef_tab <- summary(fit_LR)$coefficients
coef_tab
exp(coef_tab[, "Estimate"])

##Figure2
df_p <- df_combined1.1 %>% 
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("ED","IC"))) %>%
  summarise(
    n_visits = sum(!is.na(hospital_admission)),
    p_admit  = mean(hospital_admission == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = group
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x_lab = paste0(group, " (", n_visits, " visits)"),
    pct_lab = sprintf("%.1f", 100 * p_admit)
  )

ggplot(df_p, aes(x = x_lab, y = 100 * p_admit)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8EC5FF", color = "#2F80ED", width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = pct_lab), vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Hospital admission (%)",
    limits = c(0, max(100 * df_p$p_admit) * 1.08),
    expand = c(0, 0)   # no gap at 0%
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL) +
  theme_classic()

# site-level admission rate (visit-level) within each group
ed_site <- df_ed2.1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(hospital_admission), !is.na(site_id)) %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  summarise(n_visits = n(),
            admit_rate = mean(hospital_admission == 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(group = "ED")

ic_site <- df_ic1.1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(hospital_admission), !is.na(site_id)) %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  summarise(n_visits = n(),
            admit_rate = mean(hospital_admission == 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(group = "IC")

site_rates <- bind_rows(ed_site, ic_site)

# smallest and largest site within each group
extremes <- site_rates %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  slice_min(admit_rate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows(
    site_rates %>%
      group_by(group) %>%
      slice_max(admit_rate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(group, admit_rate)

extremes

#Waittimes at IC and ED
df_ic3 <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/df_ic3.csv")

df_ic3$discharge_datetime <- as.POSIXct(df_ic3$discharge_datetime, format = fmt, tz = tz)
df_ic3$checkin_datetime   <- as.POSIXct(df_ic3$checkin_datetime,   format = fmt, tz = tz)

df_ic3$duration_visit <- as.numeric(difftime(df_ic3$discharge_datetime,
                                               df_ic3$checkin_datetime,
                                               units = "mins"))
df_ic3 <- df_ic3 %>% 
  filter(duration_visit > 0)

```
